CustomField.description: Specifies the Opportunity Contact Role automatically assigned to the Primary Contact on Opportunities belonging to organizational (non-individual) Accounts. This applies when the Account is not a Household, One-to-One, or Individual Account. Must match an existing Contact Role picklist value. See also Contact Role for Individual Opps for individual Account types.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Contact Role assigned to the Primary Contact on organizational Account Opportunities. Applies when the Account is not Household, One-to-One, or Individual.
CustomField.label: Contact Role for Organizational Opps
